source_desc: NPR error/404 page (returned when requesting a non-existent article URL). Kept because its template still emits live microdata.
notes: HTTP 404 page. Real, public, verbatim HTML whose template includes a live SpeakableSpecification microdata item (uses https://schema.org/). Included as a thin/edge-case sample and for SpeakableSpecification type coverage; provenance is intentionally an NPR error page, not a live article.
